articles.title: Bill Belichick gets candid on Tom Brady’s growth with Patriots: ‘He wasn’t even really good, but he became great’
articles.description:
"You couldn't get any further on the bench than he was. He was the fourth string, never even played, never even dressed."

The post Bill Belichick gets candid on Tom Brady’s growth with Patriots: ‘He wasn’t even really good, but he became great’ appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Bill Belichick reflects on Tom Brady's early struggles as a fourth-string quarterback.
Brady was never dressed for games during his initial time with the Patriots.
Belichick's comments highlight the importance of growth and perseverance for Boston athletes.

articles.title: As Minogue pours millions into his own campaign, state lawmaker pushes to ban self-funding
articles.description:
GOP candidate Mike Minogue has contributed $13.5 million to his campaign for governor.

The post As Minogue pours millions into his own campaign, state lawmaker pushes to ban self-funding appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: GOP candidate Mike Minogue invests $13.5 million in his gubernatorial campaign.
State lawmaker proposes legislation to ban self-funding in political campaigns.
Potential changes could affect future campaign financing for Boston candidates.

articles.title: Celtics fans voted NBA’s ‘most obnoxious’ in anonymous player poll
articles.description:
"There’s a fine line between fans being deemed passionate vs. obnoxious, and the Celtics’ loyalists are apparently walking it quite well."

The post Celtics fans voted NBA’s ‘most obnoxious’ in anonymous player poll appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Celtics fans ranked as the NBA's 'most obnoxious' in a player poll.
The poll highlights the passionate nature of Boston's fanbase among NBA players.
This perception may influence how players view Boston's home games and fan interactions.
